elements.name: Description
texts:
Croaghbrack is in the Electoral Division of Templecarn, in Civil Parish of Templecarn, in the Barony of Tirhugh, in the County of Donegal

Croaghbrack is on Logainm.ie: Croaghbrack.

Croaghbrack has an area of:

    -6,974,912 m² / 697.49 hectares / 6.9749 km²
    -2.69 square miles
    -1723.54 acres / 1723 acres, 2 roods, 6 perches

Nationwide, it is the 606th largest townland that we know about

Within Co. Donegal, it is the 82nd largest townland
